name: StarTrack – Internal Rating System
description: Let every Jellyfin user rate movies and TV shows on a 1–5 star scale and see the community average inline.
overview: StarTrack adds a compact star-rating pill to every Movie and TV Series detail page. Click it to expand a full panel where you can submit or update your rating, and see a dropdown of every individual user's score. All ratings are stored privately on your Jellyfin server — nothing leaves your network.

versions.changelog: Initial release — star ratings for Movies and TV Shows, community average display, expandable user score list, and remove-rating support.
